title: Bridge Essay: Pride: A meta-analytic project.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Wind/Pride** (Phase 4) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Wind/Pride to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Pride: Ameta-analytic project.** — Emotion. PMID: 33180528. DOI: 10.1037/emo0000905. Pride is acomplex construct, at times conceptualized positively (as apositive emotional reaction to apersonal success) and at other times defined negatively (as exhibiting arrogant or conceited feelings and beliefs). Based on this dichotomy, Tracy and Robins proposed that pride consists of two facets: authentic pride (AP) and hubristic pride (HP). For over adecade, researchers have used this two-facet model to investigate similarities and differences between AP and HP. The current wor
